description_long: This is a sleek, modern business jet with a streamlined fuselage and a pointed nose, designed for high-speed travel. The airplane features a low-wing configuration with slightly swept-back wings and small winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. The fuselage is painted in a combination of light beige, gray, and black, with a distinctive black tail fin and matching accents on the engine nacelles. The windows are arranged in a linear row along the side, indicating a pressurized cabin for passengers. The tail section is equipped with a T-tail design, where the horizontal stabilizer is mounted atop the vertical fin. The engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, flanking the tail, and the landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable.
description: A modern, streamlined business jet with a low-wing, swept-back design, T-tail, and rear-mounted engines. The fuselage is painted in beige, gray, and black with a row of passenger windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, row of windows, swept-back low wings, and prominent T-tail with rear-mounted engines.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with slight upward winglets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the tail and engine nacelles more visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full wing shape, placement of engines at the rear, and the T-tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, slightly swept-back wings with small upward winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows
